author: நக்கீரர் / Nakkirar
scope: Tamil text, transliteration and compiled explanatory material.
useInRelease: Primary literary witness for the six Murugan landscapes and abodes.
qualityNote: This uploaded file is treated as a transcription/compilation, not as a critical scholarly edition. Release 147 cites precise internal headings and verse ranges and avoids unsupported historical claims.

author: ஸ்ரீ தேவராய சுவாமிகள் / Sri Devaraya Swamigal
editionType: Section contained in the user-uploaded compilation
scope: Opening invocation and six temple-linked Kavasam sections.
useInRelease: Verified opening extract and source note for Kanda Sashti Kavasam.
qualityNote: Only the verified opening extract is published in this release. A complete critical edition remains outside Release 147.

author: அருணகிரிநாதர் / Arunagirinathar
scope: Numbered Thiruppugazh corpus with venue, rhythmic and song-text headings.
useInRelease: Primary source for the first ten manually checked digital song records in Release 149.
qualityNote: Release 149 publishes only manually checked song texts. OCR-only text and unverified commentary are not published.

author: ஸ்ரீமத் சத்குரு சாந்தானந்த சுவாமிகள்
sourceType: Devotional text contained in the user-uploaded compilation
scope: Opening invocation and the numbered text extending beyond line 380.
useInRelease: Source witness for the manually checked opening invocation and lines 1–20 in Release 151.
qualityNote: This is not treated as a critical edition. Release 151 publishes only the verified opening extract and does not reproduce the complete modern work.
